title: Terraria Underground Biomes
description: A mod that adds underground jungle and desert from terraria!
body:
# Terraria Underground Biomes This is a mod that is supposed to add underground jungle and undeground desert biomes from terraria, as well as ores, weapons and mobs from these biomes.
**Right now the mod is in early alpha and adds only some things that are planned.**
## Requirements The mod is made only for Minecraft 1.20.1 and requires Fabric API to work propertly!
